texto: No true power can be founded among men which does not depend upon the free union of their inclinations
autor: and patriotism and religion are the only two motives in the world which can permanently direct the whole of the body politic to one end.
explicacao: Citação de and patriotism and religion are the only two motives in the world which can permanently direct the whole of the body politic to one end. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “No true power can be founded among men which does not depend upon the free union of their inclina…” articula reflexao, alexis-de-tocqueville, democracy-in-america em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e democracy-in-america.
